case_title: WILLIAM MANN VS. DRAEGER CONSTRUCTION, INC. A CALIFORNIA

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF MANN, WILLIAM AS TO DEFENDANT DRAEGER CONSTRUCTION, INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MANN, WILLIAM RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DRAEGER CONSTRUCTION, INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION $248,643.20 PRINCIPAL, $2,790.76 INTEREST, $450.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $251,883.96, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
